CREATE.TITLE: Create company
CREATE.DESCRIPTION: Add a company so you can link contacts and keep related context together.

PLACEHOLDERS.NAME: Acme Inc
PLACEHOLDERS.DESCRIPTION: Add a short summary for this company

EMPTY_STATE.TITLE: Company not found
EMPTY_STATE.SUBTITLE: This company may have been removed or is no longer available in this account.

AVATAR.UPLOAD_ERROR: Could not update the company avatar.
AVATAR.DELETE_ERROR: Could not remove the company avatar.

PROFILE.TITLE: Edit company details
PROFILE.DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: Add a short description for this company

CONTACTS.EMPTY: No contacts are linked to this company yet.

ADD.DESCRIPTION: Search contacts in this account and link them to this company.
ADD.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search by name, email, phone, or identifier
ADD.INITIAL: Start typing to search contacts in this account.
ADD.CONFIRM_DESCRIPTION: Review the contact and company before linking.

MESSAGES.ADD_ERROR: Could not link the contact to this company.
MESSAGES.REMOVE_ERROR: Could not remove the contact from this company.

NOTES.TITLE: Notes
NOTES.SUBTITLE: Notes captured across contacts.
NOTES.EMPTY: No notes found for contacts yet.

HISTORY.TITLE: Conversation history
HISTORY.SUBTITLE: Recent conversations across contacts.

DELETE.SECTION_DESCRIPTION: Delete this company and unlink its contacts. The contacts will remain in the account.
DELETE.TITLE: Delete company?
DELETE.DESCRIPTION: This will remove the company and unlink all associated contacts. Contacts themselves will be preserved.
DELETE.DESCRIPTION_WITH_NAME: This will remove {companyName} and unlink all associated contacts. Contacts themselves will be preserved.

PAGINATION_FOOTER.SHOWING: Showing {startItem} – {endItem} of {totalItems} company | Showing {startItem} – {endItem} of {totalItems} companies
